sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $120M contract with an international consortium represents a significant and stable revenue stream for the company.

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 7% confirms strong operational performance and market demand.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
